name: Apple Sauce Cake
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup apple sauce, strained and hot
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift cake flour once, then measure and add baking powder, soda, salt, and spices, sifting together three times.
2. Cream butter thoroughly, gradually adding sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Add egg, beating well, then alternately add the flour mixture and apple sauce in small amounts, beating after each addition until smooth.
4. Pour batter into a greased loaf pan (9-1/2 x 5-1/2 x 3 inches) and bake in a moderate oven (350 degrees F.) for 1 hour or until done.
